title: Full-Stack Security Audit Pipeline
description: Automated full-stack security audit: web2 recon → web3 audit → smart contract review → on-chain forensics → bug bounty report

steps.name: Web2 Reconnaissance
steps.description: Subdomain enumeration, endpoint discovery, technology fingerprinting, WAF detection

steps.name: Web Application Pentest
steps.description: XSS, SQLi, SSRF, IDOR, Auth bypass, CORS, CSRF, file upload, race conditions

steps.name: Smart Contract Audit
steps.description: 10 DeFi bug classes, access control, reentrancy, oracle manipulation, flash loan attacks

steps.name: On-Chain Forensics
steps.description: Trace exploit transactions, reconstruct attack vectors, fund flow analysis

steps.name: Bug Bounty Report
steps.description: Professional vulnerability report with PoC, business impact, remediation
